parsed_review.summary: CP00-628 is a descriptor-only Risk B closeout pack (RP20.P05.M03.S21-RP20.P05.M05.S16, 40 units) for the Data Room/VDR P05 secondary-workflow and permission/audit bridge. Independent read-only review (Read/Grep/Glob only) confirms the descriptor-verified claim is supported and no production_ready gate is weakened: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor are honestly declared. Unit math is exact (M03=2 + M04=22 + M05=16 = 40) and the deliverable distribution {implementation:14, fixture:14, claude_review:2, security_audit:4, test:5, hermes_evidence:1} matches the prompt baseline, registry DELIVERABLE_COUNTS, and contract projection. No-write/no-real-data/no-runtime boundaries hold: validators.js asserts 35+ dispatch/write/runtime flags false, the freezeCp628Result->...->freezeCp610Result chain pins all base no-write flags, and 3 CP628 tests plus 57/57 passing model tests confirm. Authority boundary is correct: Claude is read_only_independent_reviewer and not final approver (authority_boundary in descriptor, claude_packet.read_only=true/claude_is_final_approval=false, forbidden_review_evidence includes claude_final_approval_claim and enterprise_trust_claim). Hermes is used only for the deterministic descriptor evidence-packet/receipt-shape (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. CP178+ hardening is wired: forbidden_review_evidence covers not_logged_in, zero_byte_output, malformed_json, fenced_json_only, tool_call_shaped_output, missing_raw_output, missing_source_inspection_basis. changed-file-scope correctly separates active pack refs from unrelated UI-workstream dirty files. No P0/P1/P2 findings. Two P3 informational notes record correctly-gated pending steps (final command matrix and exactly-one-valid review-receipt normalization) that the closeout harness must still enforce before this pack flips to closed; these are expected sequencing, not defects, so they do not block.

findings.title: Final command matrix pending (expected sequencing, harness-gated)
findings.details: command-evidence records only descriptor-level checks (node --check x5 exit 0, npm run rp20:data-room-vdr-core:validate exit 0 with covered_units 40, node --test model.test.js 1..57 pass 57 fail 0) and sets gate_outcome=pending_final_command_matrix / hermes_gate.status=pending_final_matrix. The full pre-closeout validation matrix from the prompt (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, rp05:matter-core:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet recorded. This is the correct order (review precedes the final matrix), not a defect.
findings.recommendation: Keep pack status in_progress until the complete command matrix is recorded green in command-evidence.json; do not flip to closed/production_ready_candidate-closed on descriptor-level checks alone.

findings.title: Exactly-one valid review receipt not yet normalized (CP178+ hardening)
findings.details: claude-review-result.json shows status=review_pending with exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false, valid_review_receipts=[] and invalid_review_attempts=[]; forward-referenced artifacts raw-output.json and review-receipt.json listed in changed-file-scope active_pack_implementation_refs do not exist yet. readiness-report.json auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1447-byte valid JSON). This review run must produce exactly one valid receipt that survives hardening rejection of auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON with prose, tool-call-shaped output, and missing required fields.
findings.recommendation: Normalize and validate exactly one valid review receipt before adjudication/inspection flip; reject any receipt matching the forbidden_review_evidence list rather than counting it as valid.
